title: Nasdaq 100 Search Trends Highlight Amazon Stock Movements
description: Recent search interest in the Nasdaq 100 in Great Britain focuses on Amazon stock performance and analyst ratings.

sources.title: Amazon: A Scaled-Up AWS Rinse And Repeat Is All It Needs (NASDAQ:AMZN)
Amazon.com Inc Stock (AMZN) Moved Up by 3.25% on Jul 15: What Signal Does It Send?
Amazon Is Maintained at Overweight by Keybanc

sections.heading: Search Interest in Great Britain
paragraphs: The term "nasdaq 100" has a Google reported search lower bound of 200 in the GB region according to the trend feed published on July 20, 2026.

sections.heading: Amazon Stock Performance
paragraphs: According to TradingKey, Amazon.com Inc Stock (AMZN) moved up by 3.25% on July 15. This news item is part of the coverage driving the current search interest.

sections.heading: Analyst Perspectives
paragraphs: Moomoo reports that Amazon is maintained at Overweight by Keybanc. Furthermore, Seeking Alpha published an article titled "Amazon: A Scaled-Up AWS Rinse And Repeat Is All It Needs (NASDAQ:AMZN)".

faq.q: What is the search volume for Nasdaq 100?
faq.a: According to the trend report, the Google reported search lower bound for "nasdaq 100" in the GB region is 200.

faq.q: Which companies are mentioned in the news coverage?
faq.a: The news coverage associated with this trend focuses on Amazon.com Inc. and its stock (AMZN).
